description_long: This house features a modern, L-shaped layout with a flat roof and large, grid-like windows dominating all exterior walls. The structure is divided into several distinct rooms, each separated by interior walls, and the windows provide ample natural light throughout. The main entryway is centrally located on one side, marked by a prominent door flanked by symmetrical window panels. The interior includes a section with visible green plants and wall art, suggesting a living or communal area. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color, with black window frames creating a striking contrast. The overall design emphasizes openness, geometric lines, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, L-shaped house with flat roof, large grid windows, and a light exterior. The design features multiple rooms and a prominent central entryway.
description_view_0: This view highlights the L-shaped layout, central entryway, and extensive grid windows on two main facades.
description_view_1: This view shows the long side of the house with continuous rows of windows and reveals the interior plant-decorated area.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the segmented room structure and the central door, with symmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_3: This view displays the broadest face of the house, showing the largest open room and the full extent of the window grid.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large grid windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with symmetrical window panels, no porch or overhang, minimalist modern style
